purpose: Global technical constraints for implementing the wizard specs in this repo.
constraints: Reads must be done in Server Components only (no client-side DB fetching).
Writes/mutations must be implemented via Next.js Server Actions only (no API routes for mutations).
All Server Action inputs must be validated with Zod (never use FormData types as parameters).
All database access must be filtered by authenticated Clerk userId from await auth(). Never trust client-provided userId.
Clerk integration must use clerkMiddleware() in proxy.ts and ClerkProvider in app/layout.tsx (no deprecated patterns).
Use shadcn/ui components for UI. Avoid custom primitives when shadcn exists.
No raw SQL; use Drizzle query builder; schema lives in src/db/schema.ts (or repo’s existing schema path).
Never hardcode secrets; use env vars only.

execution_format.stop_condition: Stop when the plan's acceptance criteria are met and the project compiles.
